gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (226/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (226/ 8)
text: سَمِعْتُ جَعْفَراً ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ جَاءَ جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ رَبُّكَ يُقْرِئُكَ السَّلَامَ وَ يَقُولُ لَكَ دَارِ خَلْقِي .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al Husayn Bin Al Hassan who said,

‘I heard Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Jibraeel<sup>as</sup> came over to the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and he<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>! Your<sup>saww</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> Coveys the greetings to you<sup>as</sup>, and is Saying to you<sup>saww</sup>: “Be polite with My<sup>azwj</sup> creatures”’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-Husayn ibn al-Hassan who has said the following: “I heard abu Ja’far (a.s.) say, ‘Jibril (the Archangel) once came to the Holy Prophet and said, “O Muhammad, your Lord sends you greetings of peace and says to you, ‘Be gentle and kind to My creatures.’””
